items.title: 更多比賽，更多爭議——該如何評價2026年FIFA世界盃？

items.summary: BBC's Azadeh Moshiri reports as thousands attempt to march to India's parliament in support of the Cockroach Janta Party's demand for education reforms.
items.title: From hundreds to thousands: How India's 'cockroach' protest movement has grown

items.summary: The next time you apply for a job, AI may screen your résumé before any human sees it. But there’s good reason to question whether AI will judge you fairly. Researchers already know that LLMs pick up human biases from their training data. New research suggests that LLMs can also develop their own…
items.title: AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring

items.summary: The latest National Police Service report recorded more than 600 assaults on recruitment officers to date and warned that the aggression has become “increasingly threatening”.
items.title: Why are Ukraine's military recruiters facing violence in their own country?

items.summary: 王計兵是中國一群憑文學作品獲得更廣泛關注的藍領工人之一。
items.title: 外賣騎手獲中國頂級文學獎，作品靈感來自日常工作挑戰
